use_cases: Command-line style inputs for AI or developer tools where users type prompts and execute actions
Form inputs with inline validation and status feedback (loading, success, error states)
Input fields with persistent history navigation via dropdown
Email or snippet inputs with action buttons like copy, delete, or submit
Multi-action input components where different buttons trigger different behaviors on the same value
ai_summary: A versatile enhanced input component combining standard text input with customizable action buttons, real-time validation, and local history management. Features status indicators (loading spinner, success checkmark, error states) and persists the last 10 entries to localStorage. Ideal for command-style interfaces, developer tools, or any workflow requiring quick action execution on typed content.
